_note: SRD 5e races. Ability bonuses, speed, traits.

traits: Fey Ancestry (advantage vs charm, immune to magic sleep)
Trance (4hr long rest instead of 8hr sleep)
Mask of the Wild (hide in light nature cover)
Dwarven Resilience (advantage vs poison, resistance to poison damage)
Stonecunning (double proficiency on History checks about stonework)
Speed not reduced by heavy armor
Dwarven Armor Training (light + medium armor proficiency)
Halfling Nimbleness (move through space of larger creature)
Stout Resilience (advantage vs poison, resistance to poison damage)
Gnome Cunning (advantage on INT/WIS/CHA saves vs magic)
Artificer's Lore (double prof on History checks about magic/tech)
Relentless Endurance (drop to 1 HP instead of 0, 1/long rest)
Savage Attacks (extra damage die on melee crit)
Infernal Legacy (thaumaturgy cantrip; hellish rebuke at 3rd level; darkness at 5th level, 1/long rest each)
Draconic Ancestry (choose dragon type: determines breath weapon damage type and resistance)
Breath Weapon (2d6 at 1st, scales; DC = 8+CON+prof; 5ft-by-30ft line or 15ft cone; 1/short rest)
